overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a high-speed night ride through Night City's downtown. The player navigates wet multi-lane streets, intersections, and distinct districts including Corpo Plaza, passing futuristic skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic under neon-lit skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with elevated highways

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at moderate speed through downtown arterial road, navigating gentle curves

notable_agents.action: silver sedan being overtaken on the right side of the motorcycle

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning across the multi-lane road ahead
tall building facade covered with large illuminated digital advertisements
high-rise building with glass facade and illuminated windows
low-rise commercial structure with bright signage and neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle ride on a wet multi-lane arterial road at night. Elevated highway structures loom ahead while holographic billboards and modern office towers line both sides of the street. The player overtakes a silver sedan on the right while maintaining a steady speed through the neon-lit urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: slows down and executes a left turn at the intersection
waits for crossing traffic from left before proceeding through intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing for intersection, executing left turn around a stopped van, and navigating through cross traffic

notable_agents.action: green delivery van stopped at the intersection blocking the path
black sedan crossing the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
boxy commercial van with green paint stopped at the traffic light
low-rise commercial buildings at the street corner with illuminated storefronts

segments.scene_description: The rider approaches an urban intersection marked by crosswalk stripes, slowing behind a green delivery van. After the van moves, the player executes a left turn while navigating around crossing traffic from the left. Street corner buildings with neon storefronts line the intersection as the motorcycle accelerates through the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-speed urban boulevard with underpasses and neon signage

events.description: passes through a covered underpass section beneath an elevated structure
enters Corpo Plaza district as indicated by on-screen text and distinctive golden architecture

agents.ego_description: accelerating to high speed on straight boulevard, passing through underpasses and approaching Corpo Plaza

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car being overtaken on the right at high speed

entered.detail: covered section of road passing underneath an elevated highway or building structure
linear array of street lamps suspended over the roadway
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle accelerates onto a wide high-speed boulevard lined with modern skyscrapers and overhead street lights. The rider passes through a covered underpass section with concrete support columns visible on both sides. A yellow sports car is overtaken on the right as the player approaches the Corpo Plaza district, signaled by on-screen text and the appearance of distinctive golden geometric architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: Corpo Plaza district with distinctive corporate architecture and covered roadways

events.description: large red SOVEREIGN neon sign becomes visible on a building ahead
enters covered roadway section under building overhang with structural beams overhead

agents.ego_description: cruising through Corpo Plaza past the golden geometric building and under the SOVEREIGN neon sign

entered.detail: distinctive building with golden honeycomb-patterned facade unique to the Corpo Plaza district
large vertical red neon sign spelling SOVEREIGN mounted on a skyscraper
roadway covered by overhead building structure creating an urban canyon effect

segments.scene_description: Riding through the affluent Corpo Plaza district, the motorcycle passes the iconic golden geometric building on the left. The large red SOVEREIGN neon sign dominates the skyline ahead before the rider enters a covered roadway section with structural beams overhead. The environment features high-end corporate architecture with extensive neon lighting and illuminated advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-speed avenue with distinctive blue neon arch installations

events.description: blue illuminated arches appear lining the right side of the roadway

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through final stretch with blue neon arches lining the right side of the road

entered.detail: series of curved blue neon light installations mounted along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment features high-speed riding along a wide avenue where distinctive blue neon arches line the right side of the road, creating a tunnel-like lighting effect. The motorcycle maintains high velocity through crosswalks and past futuristic building facades, with the blue illuminated structures providing a striking visual signature to this section of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed motorcycle ride through a neon-lit urban canyon that evolves from a wet arterial road into the opulent, geometrically structured heart of the corporate district. It begins by weaving through traffic beneath holographic billboards and towering office blocks, moving steadily past a silver sedan toward a busy intersection. As the rider navigates a left turn around a delivery van and crossing traffic, the scene opens into a wide boulevard where the camera glides through a concrete underpass and overtakes a yellow sports car. The environment then shifts into the affluent Corpo Plaza, characterized by golden geometric architecture and a dominant red Sovereign neon sign, before the path narrows under heavy structural beams. Finally, the ride accelerates along a wide avenue where a series of striking blue neon arches create a tunnel-like effect against the futuristic building facades.
